case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. RENE TUCKER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
